title: Acrostichum lomarioides
taxonomy: Acrostichum lomarioides belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. It is a species of fern that is native to tropical regions. This epiphytic fern is often found growing on trees and other plants. Acrostichum lomarioides is classified as a species within the genus Acrostichum. It is a member of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies.
uses: Acrostichum lomarioides, also known as the leather fern, is a plant species with various traditional medicinal uses. In some cultures, it is used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties.
